parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT pipeline, SUM(deals_total) AS deals
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_deals_daily`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
  AND qoyod_source IN ('Meta Ads','Google Ads','Snapchat Ads','Tiktok Ads','Microsoft Ads')
  AND pipeline IN ('Sales Pipeline','Bookkeeping','Qflavours')
GROUP BY pipeline

SELECT SUM(leads_total) AS leads
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
